question_intent: Average points per driver for constructors from the UK who have won at least one race in the 2008 season

plan.question_intent: Average points per driver for constructors from the UK who have won at least one race in the 2008 season
plan.detail_query: SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name AS constructor_name, AVG(r.points) AS avg_points FROM drivers AS d JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid JOIN target AS t ON d.driverid = t.driverid AND ra.raceid = t.raceid WHERE c.nationality = 'British' AND ra.year = 2008 AND t.win = 1 GROUP BY d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name HAVING COUNT(t.win) >= 1

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name AS constructor_name, AVG(r.points) AS avg_points
join_clauses: JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN target AS t ON d.driverid = t.driverid AND ra.raceid = t.raceid
blocks.group_by_clause: GROUP BY d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name
blocks.notes: Average points per driver for constructors from the UK who have won at least one race in the 2008 season

steps.reason: where predicate made the probe empty

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN target AS t ON d.driverid = t.driverid AND t.win = 1
WHERE (c.nationality = 'British') AND (t.win = 1)
LIMIT 5

SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name AS constructor_name, AVG(r.points) AS avg_points
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN target AS t ON d.driverid = t.driverid AND t.win = 1
WHERE (c.nationality = 'British') AND (t.win = 1)
GROUP BY d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name
HAVING (COUNT(t.win) >= 1)

SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name AS constructor_name, AVG(r.points) AS avg_points
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN target AS t ON d.driverid = t.driverid AND t.win = 1
WHERE (c.nationality = 'British') AND (t.win = 1)
GROUP BY d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name
HAVING (COUNT(t.win) >= 1)

SELECT *
FROM (SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name AS constructor_name, AVG(r.points) AS avg_points
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN target AS t ON d.driverid = t.driverid AND t.win = 1
WHERE (c.nationality = 'British') AND (t.win = 1)
GROUP BY d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name
HAVING (COUNT(t.win) >= 1)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.avg_points) AS average_points
FROM (SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name AS constructor_name, AVG(r.points) AS avg_points
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN target AS t ON d.driverid = t.driverid AND t.win = 1
WHERE (c.nationality = 'British') AND (t.win = 1)
GROUP BY d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name
HAVING (COUNT(t.win) >= 1)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.avg_points) AS average_points
FROM (SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name AS constructor_name, AVG(cs.points) AS avg_points
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN constructors c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
JOIN races ra ON cs.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE (ra.year >= 2010) AND (cs.wins >= 0)
GROUP BY d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name
HAVING (AVG(cs.points) > 0)) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average of the average points scored by each British-constructor driver who has won at least one target race?
